A Perfect Getaway (2009)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $15,515,460Details
International Box Office $7,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $22,815,460
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $6,608,988
Total $6,608,988
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,948,555 (38.3% of total gross)
Legs:2.61 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:68.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$14,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,159 opening theaters/2,159 max. theaters, 3.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $24,741,987

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 7th, 2009 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: September 27th, 2012 (Wide) (Portugal)
Video Release: December 29th, 2009 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for graphic violence, language including sexual references and some drug use.
Running Time: 97 minutes
Geographical setting: Hawaii
Plot point: False Identity, Serial Killer, Surprise Twist, Tourists In Trouble
Social setting: Honeymoon
Subgenre: Psychological Thriller
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Rogue Pictures
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
